name: review-family
description: Evidence-first review, scrutiny, and review-adjudication skills

interface.longDescription: Run bounded, evidence-first reviews across implementation, architecture, skill behavior, execution-readiness, adversarial scrutiny, and supplied-review or claim adjudication.
defaultPrompt: Run an execution-readiness review: check whether this plan is ready to execute
Run a formal stress test of this proposal
Review this skill as a behavior contract
Review this implementation against the spec
Use $review-reviewer to check these claims against the current repo
Use $review-reviewer to adjudicate this review before I act
